member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICIMDatasetFactoryBridge
member.summary: Provides access to methods for creating CIM-based datasets.
Creates an annotation feature class using the properties in the definition.
Creates a dimension feature class using the properties in the definition.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge
member.summary: Provides access to properties defining an annotation feature class to be created.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.AllowSymbolOverrides
member.summary: Indicates if an annotation may override a symbol property even though it references the symbol collection.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.AutoCreate
member.summary: Indicates if feature-linked annotation is to be automatically created when a feature is created.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ConfigKeyword
member.summary: The geodatabase configuration keyword.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.FeatureClassName
member.summary: The name of the feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.FeatureDataset
member.summary: The feature dataset to create the annotation feature class in. If null, the feature class will be standalone.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.FeatureLinked
member.summary: Indicates if the feature class is feature-linked.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.FeatureWorkspace
member.summary: The workspace to create the annotation feature class in.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.Fields
member.summary: The fields collection to create the annotation feature class with. If null, default fields will be used.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.GeneralPlacementPropertiesJSON
member.summary: The general placement properties of the label engine.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.GeometryDef
member.summary: The geometry definition of the feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.HasBigObjectID
member.summary: Indicates if the feature class should be created with a 64-bit OID.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.HasGlobalID
member.summary: Indicates if the feature class should be created with a Global ID.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.HasGlobalIDRelationship
member.summary: Indicates if the feature-linked annotation relationship class should be created with a Global ID.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.LabelClassCollectionJSON
member.summary: The annotation class properties of the annotation feature class expressed as a collection of label classes.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.LinkedFeatureClass
member.summary: The linked feature class if creating feature-linked annotation.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ReferenceScale
member.summary: The reference scale of the annotation feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ReferenceScaleUnit
member.summary: The reference scale unit of the annotation feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.RequireSymbolID
member.summary: Indicates if an annotation must reference a symbol in the symbol collection.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ShapeFieldName
member.summary: The name of the shape field.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.SymbolCollectionJSON
member.summary: The symbol collection of the annotation feature class as a JSON string.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.TextStringFieldLength
member.summary: The length of the text string field.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.UpdateOnShapeChange
member.summary: Indicates if an annotation is to be automatically recreated when a feature's shape is changed.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge
member.summary: Provides access to properties defining an dimension feature class to be created.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ConfigKeyword
member.summary: The geodatabase configuration keyword.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.DimensionStyleCollectionJSON
member.summary: A JSON string representing the collection of dimension styles associated with the dimension feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.FeatureClassName
member.summary: The name of the feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.FeatureDataset
member.summary: The feature dataset to create the dimension feature class in. If null, the feature class will be standalone.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.FeatureWorkspace
member.summary: The workspace to create the dimension feature class in.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.Fields
member.summary: The fields collection to create the dimension feature class with. If null, default fields will be used.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ReferenceScale
member.summary: The reference scale of the dimension feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ReferenceScaleUnit
member.summary: The reference scale unit of the dimension feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge.ShapeFieldName
member.summary: The name of the shape field.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureBridge
member.summary: Provides access to members that control an annotation feature.

code.description: CIMTextGraphic simple definition of a text graphic

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureBridge.AnnotationClassID
member.summary: Label Class ID.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureBridge.AnnotationJSON
member.summary: The JSON representing the annotation graphic for the feature.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureBridge.GraphicOutline
member.summary: The geometry outline of the annotation.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureBridge.LinkedFeatureID
member.summary: Feature ID.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge
member.summary: Provides access to the annotation feature class extension.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.AllowSymbolOverrides
member.summary: Indicates if an annotation may override a symbol property even though it references the symbol collection.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.AutoCreate
member.summary: Indicates if feature-linked annotation is to be automatically created when a feature is created.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.Build
member.summary: The build number of the annotation feature class. Used for internal purposes.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.CIMVersion
member.summary: The CIM Version of the annotation feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.FeatureClass
member.summary: The annotation feature class this class extension applies to.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.GeneralPlacementPropertiesJSON
member.summary: The general placement properties of the label engine.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.LabelClassCollectionJSON
member.summary: The annotation class properties of the annotation feature class expressed as a collection of label classes.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.LinkedFeatureClass
member.summary: The feature class to which the annotation class is feature linked.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.MaxLabelClassID
member.summary: The maximum symbol ID value of the symbol collection.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.MaxSymbolID
member.summary: The maximum symbol ID value of the symbol collection.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.ReferenceScale
member.summary: The reference scale.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.ReferenceScaleUnit
member.summary: The reference scale units of the annotation feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.RequireSymbolID
member.summary: Indicates if an annotation must reference a symbol in the symbol collection.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.ResetProperties
member.summary: Resets the annotation feature class extension to the properties persisted in the dataset.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.SymbolCollectionJSON
member.summary: The symbol collection of the annotation feature class as a JSON string.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.UpdateOnShapeChange
member.summary: Indicates if an annotation is to be automatically recreated when a feature's shape is changed.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.UpdateProperties
member.summary: Updates the annotation feature class extension properties in the database with this object's properties in their current state.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge.Version
member.summary: The version of the annotation feature class. Used for internal purposes.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge
member.summary: Provides access to the dimension feature class extension.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.Build
member.summary: The build number of the dimension feature class. Used for internal purposes.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.CIMVersion
member.summary: The CIM Version of the dimension feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.DimensionStylesJSON
member.summary: A JSON string representing the collection of dimension styles associated with the dimension feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.FieldIndexes
member.summary: Get the field indexes

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.MaxStyleID
member.summary: The maximum style ID in the style collection.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.ReferenceScale
member.summary: The reference scale of the dimension feature class.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.ReferenceScaleUnit
member.summary: The reference scale units of the dimension feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.ResetProperties
member.summary: Resets the in state of the dimension feature class properties to what is persisted in the dataset.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.UpdateProperties
member.summary: Updates the dimension feature class' properties from the current state of this object.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge.Version
member.summary: The version of the dimension feature class. Used for internal purposes.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge
member.summary: Provides access to members that control a dimension feature.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.CustomLength
member.summary: The dimension feature's custom or user-defined length.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.DimensionLineOptionJSON
member.summary: The JSON representation of the dimension line option for the feature.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.DimensionShapeJSON
member.summary: A JSON string representing the dimension feature's shape.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.DimensionTypeJSON
member.summary: The JSON representation of the dimension type of the feature.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.ExtensionLineOptionJSON
member.summary: TThe JSON representation of the extension line display of the feature.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.Length
member.summary: The dimension feature's length.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.MarkerOptionJSON
member.summary: The JSON representation of the arrow display of the feature.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.StyleID
member.summary: The dimension feature's style Id.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX.IMEDimensionFeatureBridge.UseCustomLength
member.summary: Indicates if this dimension feature displays the dimension length or a custom length.

member.summary: Provides access to dummy methods protecting name correctness.
